name: Jalepeno Cheese Crackers
recipeIngredient: 3 oz Cheddar cheese, cubed into 1/2-inch pieces
1 tbsp Jalepeno pepper, seeded and minced
recipeInstructions: Preheat oven to 400°F. Process cheese and jalepeno in a food processor until chopped into 1/4-inch pieces. Add butter, pulsing on and off until the mixture resembles small peas. Stir flour with cornmeal, salt, chili powder, and mustard in a small bowl until blended. Add this mixture to the food processor, pulsing on and off until just combined. Sprinkle water evenly over the mixture in the processor, pulsing on and off until dough begins to form into a ball. Shape dough into an 8-inch disk. Wrap in plastic wrap; refrigerate until firm enough to roll out, about 30 minutes. On a floured surface, roll dough to 1/4-inch thickness. Cut into 2-inch rounds using a cookie cutter or wine glass. Transfer crackers to an ungreased baking sheet. Prick each cracker once with a fork. Bake in the preheated oven for 10 to 12 minutes or until crisp. Transfer to a rack to cool. Store in an airtight container. Makes about 50 crackers.
